div.p: HL7 v2+ uses coded values extensively throughout its messages, segments, and data types. The vocabulary artifacts (code systems and value sets) for V2 are published and maintained at terminology.hl7.org (THO — the HL7 Terminology server) under the Unified Terminology Governance (UTG) process.
Code systems define the set of valid coded values for HL7-defined tables (ID data type) and user-defined tables (IS data type). The complete list of V2 code systems is available at:
Value sets bind code systems to specific data elements in the V2 specification, defining which codes are valid for a given field. The complete list of V2 value sets is available at:
V2 terminology is managed through the HL7 Unified Terminology Governance (UTG) process. Proposals for new codes, code system changes, and value set modifications follow the UTG workflow.
